name: frontend-backend-test-squad
summary: 3 parallel Sonnet workers (frontend, backend, test) + 1 Opus coordinator. Standard full-stack feature squad.
when_to_use: Features requiring coordinated changes across UI, API, and test layers with clear file-boundary ownership.

composition.note: Runs in main context; decomposes, merges, resolves conflicts

coordination: Phase 1 (parallel): frontend-agent + backend-agent implement their slices in separate worktrees.
Phase 2 (sequential): test-agent writes tests covering both slices (reads both outputs).
Phase 3 (main): coordinator reviews, resolves type conflicts, commits.
worktree_guidance: Frontend + backend in separate worktrees (isolation: 'worktree'). Test-agent in main worktree — it needs to read both outputs.
quality_gates: After Phase 1: type-check all changed files.
After Phase 2: run test suite; block if new tests fail.
Merge condition: all 3 agents report DONE with 0 type errors.
shared_state_rule: Shared files (types, constants): backend-agent owns writes, frontend-agent reads.
anti_patterns: Running all three agents in parallel (test-agent needs prior outputs).
No type-check gate after phase 1 — merge conflicts later.
